Linux Directory Structure

Linux directory structure hakkinda birtakim bilgiler

Linux Directory Structure:

  • \ (Root)
    • \bin
    • \boot
    • \cdrom
    • \dev
    • \etc
    • \home
    • \init
    • \lib
    • \lib32
    • \lib64
    • \libx32
    • \lost+found
    • \media
    • \mnt
    • \opt
    • \proc
    • \root
    • \run
    • \sbin
    • \srv
    • \sys
    • \tmp
    • \usr
    • \var
